mapper.insert: INSERT INTO freeboard_comment ( commentid, boardid, userid, username, content, parentid, hidden, createdat ) VALUES ( seq_freeboard_comment_id.nextval, #{boardId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{content}, #{parentId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0, sysdate )
mapper.select: SELECT commentid AS commentId, boardid AS boardId, userid AS userId, username AS userName, content, parentid AS parentId, hidden, createdat AS createdAt, updatedat AS updatedAt FROM freeboard_comment WHERE commentid = #{commentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE freeboard_comment SET content = #{content}, updatedat = sysdate WHERE commentid = #{commentId}
